releases.name: CIMTrack Sprint 3 - iOS
releases.notes:
• Enhanced attendance system with Punch In/Out visibility on Home Screen, integrated API updates, and restriction of Punch Out within 5 minutes of Punch In
• Improved daily activity flow by auto-skipping the activity popup if activity is already submitted for the day
• Strengthened security with mandatory password change for default credentials, OTP-based Forgot Password, and enhanced password rules
• Added Geo-Tagged Image Capture with latitude, longitude, timestamp metadata and option to share captured images
• Implemented system event logging for app termination, GPS/location permission changes, and background location status
• Improved sync experience with network connectivity and signal strength visibility, plus iOS log file fixes
• Optimized background location tracking using activity recognition for better battery efficiency and idle-state handling

releases.name: CIMTrack Sprint 3 - Android
releases.notes:

releases.name: Parvati Release
releases.notes:
We have released the latest firmware version, LRTU3100_v1.0.15, for QA/UAT validation. The firmware package is available on SharePoint under 3100_1.0.15.

This release introduces several enhancements and new features. The LCD interface has been updated to display PT status with clear labels, including Main PT, PT1, and PT2, enabling easier identification and monitoring of PT connections directly from the device display.

In addition, we have introduced the first version (1.0.0) of the Android and iOS mobile applications. These applications provide mobile access to core Parvati functionalities, including real-time RTU/Gateway monitoring, device parameter management, reporting, PT monitoring, and schedule configuration. Device communication workflows have also been enhanced with support for real-time synchronization, manual data fetching, PT data retrieval, and automated valve scheduling. Furthermore, reporting capabilities, data export functions, and monitoring dashboards have been optimized to improve operational visibility and accessibility for field users.

The Android and iOS applications have been submitted to the Google Play Store and Apple App Store and are currently under review. Subject to the respective platform approval timelines, the applications are expected to be available during the upcoming week. Download links will be shared once the publication process is completed.

• Reliable data saving with accurate Activity History tracking

testCases.title: Performance under load
testCases.steps:
Precondition: User is logged in and on Apply Voucher screen
Steps: 1. Navigate to Apply Voucher
2. Click "Add Expense"
3. Add valid expense entries repeatedly (50+ times)
4. Save each expense
5. Observe UI responsiveness
6. Attempt to scroll and interact with all expense cards
7. Click Save Voucher / Submit
Test Data: 50+ expense entries with varied data (different dates, heads, amounts)
testCases.expected: Application should remain stable without crash or freeze; all expense cards should render correctly; scrolling should be smooth; Save/Submit action should work without delay or data loss

testCases.title: Network failure handling
testCases.steps:
Precondition: User is on Add Expense or Apply Voucher screen with valid data entered
Steps: 1. Add expense with valid data
2. Turn OFF internet connection
3. Click "Save Expense" or "Submit Voucher"
4. Observe system response
5. Turn ON internet and retry
Test Data: Valid expense data
testCases.expected: System should show proper error message (e.g., network error); no data corruption should occur; data should either be locally (if offline supported) or user should be prompted to retry; no duplicate entries should be created after retry

testCases.title: Draft edit and submit flow

Steps: 1. Navigate to My Vouchers

3. Edit one or more expense entries (modify amount, add new expense, delete existing)
4. Save changes
5. Click Submit
Test Data: Existing draft with multiple expenses
testCases.expected: Changes should be saved correctly; updated data should reflect in voucher; upon submission, voucher status should change from Draft to Submitted and move to next stage
